failing_pipelines.issue: Invalid Go version format in go.mod
failing_pipelines.fix_description: Changed go.mod version directive from '1.24.0' to '1.24'. Go version format must be MAJOR.MINOR not MAJOR.MINOR.PATCH. This was causing golangci-lint to fail.
failing_pipelines.errors_fixed: golangci-lint: invalid go version '1.24.0': must match format 1.23

failing_pipelines.issue: GitHub API error during release creation (HTTP 500 unicorn page)
failing_pipelines.fix_description: Transient GitHub API failure during release creation. Version was bumped to 0.0.4 but release creation returned GitHub's error page. Current version is now 0.0.5 from subsequent runs. This is a stale failure from March 10.
failing_pipelines.note: University course repo with no active development. Multiple failed runs due to recurring GitHub API issues. Not worth forcing manual release creation.
